'''''Ignat''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] used by the [[Airam (group)|Airam]]. It was part of the joint-operation that was [[Mission to Kuras Drift|attacked]] by rival Airam clan leader [[Ilay]] and the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], [[Wasp (Imperial-class)|''Wasp'']]. Fortunately, the operation was a success and Ignat escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
